# Punch Clock

Punch Clock is a simple private punch clock app and work hours tracker for iPhone.

Website: https://punchclocktimer.com/
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6761683006?pt=127986200&ct=landingpage&mt=8
Privacy policy: https://mpktec.se/privacy/punchclock-en/
Developer: MPK Tec AB
Developer website: https://mpktec.se/
Support: support@mpktec.se

## Summary

Punch Clock helps people track work hours on iPhone without a heavy HR, payroll, or scheduling system. Users can clock in, clock out, track breaks, review worked time, edit recorded shifts, and export PDF timesheet reports.

The app is intended for hourly workers, consultants, freelancers, self-employed people, small business owners, people with flexible schedules, and anyone who wants a private record of their workday.

## Key Features

- Clock in and clock out on iPhone.
- Track work breaks.
- See a live timer for active shifts.
- View worked time today and this week.
- Review shift history.
- Edit start time, end time, breaks, and notes.
- Add, remove, or adjust breaks.
- Use automatic default break deduction for shifts that overlap a configured break interval.
- Set long-shift reminders.
- Export PDF timesheet reports.
- Choose report periods such as today, this week, previous week, this month, previous month, last 30 days, or a custom date range.
- Choose summary or detailed reports.
- Show or hide breaks, notes, and irrelevant days in reports.
- Store work log data locally on the device.
- Use the app without creating an account.
- Track time fully offline.

## Privacy

Punch Clock has no account system. Work shifts, breaks, notes, and edits are stored locally on the user's device. Information leaves the device only when the user chooses to export a report or send feedback by email.

The app has no tracking according to its privacy manifest.

## Pricing

Punch Clock includes a 7-day free trial. Continued use is unlocked with Punch Clock PRO as a one-time purchase for US$4.99. There is no subscription.

## Important Positioning

Punch Clock is a personal time tracking app and private work time log. It is not an HR system, payroll service, scheduling platform, legal advice, or a compliance guarantee. Users and employers are responsible for checking applicable rules.
